title: cardamine pratensis proles dentata
intro: Cardamine pratensis proles dentata, commonly known as the lesser celandine or fig buttercup, is a perennial plant belonging to the family Brassicaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as relieving respiratory issues and soothing skin irritations, and it is often used to treat conditions like bronchitis and eczema. The herbal preparations of Cardamine pratensis proles dentata typically include infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
